description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8-jdk Docker image, caches the .gradle/wrapper and .gradle/caches directories, and defines a single build stage. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory via before_script (export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle), executes ./gradlew build install, and stores the resulting JAR files from build/libs/*.jar as artifacts that expire in 1 week. Include an after_script that echoes "End CI".
